ead.archdesc:

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Policy Analysis and Management records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Policy Analysis and Management
Parrot, Andrea.
Tiffany, Jennifer.
Battistella, Roger M.
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Service Studies
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Consumer Economics and Housing
23-26-3006
4 videocassettes. 4 videocassettes.
5.6 cubic feet. 5.6 cubic feet
1993-2012. Reports, minutes, course materials, videotapes Course material, reports, committee meeting minutes, plans and proposals concerning the Department of Policy Analysis and Management and material relating to the merger of the Department of Human Service Studies and Consumer Economics and Housing. Collection material in English 3375539
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Carolyn Smith
Date completed:
Mar. 1, 2004
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, March 2004 Daniel W. Young, October 2010
Date modified:
RMC Staff, September 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
In 1998, the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing and the Department of Human Service Studies merged to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Course material, reports, committee meeting minutes, plans and proposals concerning the Department of Policy Analysis and Management and material relating to the merger of the Department of Human Service Studies and Consumer Economics and Housing. Includes videotapes with Policy Analysis and Management faculty appearances: Jennifer Tiffany, "Talking with Kids About AIDS"; Andrea Parrot on Larry King Live; Roger Battistella on health care reform.
RELATED MATERIAL
Additional material and digital versions can be found online here: http://ecommons.library.cornell.edu/handle/1813/531
SERIES LIST
Series I. Reports, Plans and Proposals
Series II. Course Material
Series III. Merger Related Material
Series IV. Faculty Material: Meeting Minutes, Memos, Grants
Series V. Committees
Series VI. Correspondence
Series VII. Budgets and Funding
Series VIII. Publications and Publicity
Series IX. Photographs
Series X. Events
Series XI. Videos
Related Materials
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records #23-23-2864
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Human Service Studies records #23-24-2894
See also College of Human Ecology records #23-2-2817
Cite As:
Department of Policy Analysis and Management records, #23-26-3006. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Videotapes. Medical care. AIDS (Disease) -- Study and teaching. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
